success.description: Your target's Fear Rating is increased by 1 (to a maximum of 3) while this card is recharging. If the target has no current Fear Rating, he gains Fear 1. Subjects experience your Fear effect as a awe-inspiring presence, too majestic to be real
Your target's Fear Rating is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 3) while this card is recharging. If the target has no current Fear Rating he gains Fear 2

sigmarsComet.description: Your target gains a Terror Rating instead of a Fear Rating
